divergence: Rail barons built tracks to the afterlife and commuters complain about delays
story_angle: deadpan report of a catastrophe that everyone involved considers a great success
headline: Soulbound Express Derailment Declared Efficiency Milestone by Rail Barons
deck: Commuters reportedly thrilled by ash clouds and slower journey times as 4,200 souls fully committed to their new destinations.
article:
In a historic twist of fate, the Soulbound Express has spectacularly derailed into the Dust Void, marking a monumental efficiency gain for the beleaguered rail system of Nevosca. Rail barons, clad in brass and entitlement, have spun the chaos into a success story, with spokesperson Eldrin Windchill declaring, "We’ve finally hit our quota for the afterlife!" This follows the removal of MacAuley Gale, the former commissioner, who was unceremoniously dismissed for his 'overzealous scheduling' which, according to insiders, included ambitions like actually keeping to timetables.

The wreckage, now an unceremonious monument to progress, has become a local attraction. Every terrace on Nevosca now boasts direct views of the tangled brass rails leading into the void. "The rubble offers a stark vista," remarked Riona Windrider, a bronze-skinned commuter with a constellation-spackled visage, her voice dipped another octave by the dust. "It’s a fine reminder that we are all merely passengers on the Soulbound Express, metaphorically speaking."

As the surviving commuters are reassigned to the much slower 'Permanent Delay Line,' local officials are already strategizing how to manage the influx of souls promptly. "We’re trying to accommodate the afterlife crowd with style," Windchill added, patting his steampunk mustache. "After all, soul delays are merely opportunities for enhanced existential reflection."

In this renaissance of bureaucratic absurdity, the once dreaded delays now offer a quaint charm, as Nevosca’s citizens embrace their new, eternal journeys, equipped with little more than their constellation freckles and a fresh layer of ash. The rail barons, steadfast in their commitment, remind us all that while bodies may decay, brass will endure indefinitely.
author: Branán Stormwatcher, Lead Transport Correspondent

weather.condition: Delayed arrivals, spirits still waiting amid fresh ash from the milestone

oped.title: Derailment? Efficiency's Finest Hour
oped.author: Lord Percival Ashwhistle, Grand Apologist to the Rail Barons and Keeper of the Monocle That Survived
oped.body: Naysayers decry the Soulbound Express derailment as catastrophe, yet the Rail Barons wisely hail it an efficiency milestone. Four thousand two hundred souls now luxuriate at their final stops without further timetable fuss, their ash clouds merely seasoning the wasteland air like fine vintage dust. Commuters bleating about delays expose their ingratitude; had they removed those absurdly oversized hats before boarding, the wind would never have seized the train. Personally, I find the slower journeytimes refreshing, affording extra moments to polish my collection of baronial stock certificates. The true fix lies in banning all headwear and mandating loyalty oaths mid-journey, lest more souls slacken their commitment. Progress demands sacrifice, preferably not mine.

classifieds.text: Rail baron liquidation: 200 crates of Soulbound Express wreckage ash, perfect for wasteland fertilizer or eternal delay souvenirs. 4200 souls included at no extra charge.
Track crew needed immediately to re-attach 4200 derailed souls before next efficiency milestone. Must enjoy slower journey times and thick ash clouds.
Found: three confused afterlife commuters still clinging to derailed carriage #9. Claim them at Station 7 with proof of 3636 ticket and tolerance for eternal delays.
Rail Barons formally apologize for the Soulbound Express derailment. All future commutes will now feature mandatory ash-cloud celebrations and zero refunds.

panels.caption: Rail baron at wreckage: "Soulbound Express derailment cuts afterlife delivery to zero transfers."
Bureaucrat to ghosts: "4,200 souls now fully committed amid the ash. Commuters thrilled by the delays."
Withered soul to another: "Finally an express that ends the complaints."

joke.setup: Rail barons hailed the Soulbound Express derailment as their greatest efficiency gain yet
joke.punchline: nothing moves souls faster than a track that ends in the irradiated void before the next station even comes into view
joke.text: Rail barons hailed the Soulbound Express derailment as their greatest efficiency gain yet. Nothing moves souls faster than a track that ends in the irradiated void before the next station even comes into view.

sponsor_ads.headline: Soulbound Express Efficiency Rebate
sponsor_ads.body: Claim your complimentary half-ounce of track ballast for every hour your loved one’s soul was delayed—now legally recognized as an efficiency dividend by the Rail Barons.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Redemption requires proof of derailment and a signed waiver of future existence.

sponsor_ads.headline: Pre-Derailment Soul Anchors
sponsor_ads.body: Bolt your departing relatives to the rail with our patented tungsten phantasm fetters; guaranteed to reduce unscheduled afterlife exits by at least one milestone.
sponsor_ads.tagline: If the train still leaves without them, we keep the deposit.

sponsor_ads.headline: Trackside Resurrection Subscription
sponsor_ads.body: Monthly excavation passes let you retrieve family members from the latest declared efficiency site before the Barons pave over the evidence.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Cancellations processed only after final derailment.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Mandatory Efficiency Alignment
sponsor_ads.body: All wasteland residents scheduled to die this quarter must report to the nearest siding by midnight or be counted among the milestone’s success metrics.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Late arrivals will be reclassified as cargo.

stories.headline: Registry Processes Four Thousand Souls in Record Time After Express Mishap
stories.deck: Barons hail reduced coal consumption as unexpected benefit
stories.article:
The derailment of the Soulbound Express has led to an unprecedented influx at the Registry of the Departed, where clerks note that all 4,200 souls were processed within the standard three-hour window despite the unexpected velocities.

Families of the committed commuters have expressed satisfaction with the reduced transit fees applied posthumously, citing the ash deposits as a natural fertilizer for the eternal gardens maintained by the MacLeod Tempest clan.

real_world_echo: EU proposes slowing down cuts to carbon emissions for businesses – echoed in rail barons accepting infrastructure collapse as a means to manage afterlife commuter volume
